tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(let [;; Filter: open PRs with >400 additions and NO Linear issue closed
      filtered (filter (fn [pr]
                         (and (= "open" (:state pr))
                              (> (:additions pr) 400)
                              (nil? (:closes_linear pr))))
                       prs)]

  ;; Count by repository
  (def by-repo (group-by :repo filtered))
